textByHash.0ef68a2ae9f53302380031c856d3136aa64e6873: Oh yes. The Draynar family has been around since before vampyres came to this world.
textByHash.3cedf76a81de3c5e4cc1400139d7366a203af402: I don't know, darling. Why don't you ask them?
textByHash.7c2055ebd4642db2bef0b0b7bfd21950f8586a07: Draynor is more commonly used as a first name though, with Draynar as a last name.
textByHash.db05841f9fd6cb75ea604307ac161b5b2ec77e95: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!
